Northern region is about to experience more intense heat, forecast of the highest temperature in the next 2 days
14:49, Mon Mar 30, 2026 (GMT+7)
According to the meteorological agency, it is forecast that on March 31, hot weather in the North will continue to increase and expand its scope.
